rationale.R1.6: Delegation is 'Polish this' — writing quality is the sole explicit charge. The artifact has severe sentence-level problems: extreme anaphoric overuse ('the failure modes that we identified' appears 6+ times in the final paragraph), redundant phrase repetition ('across the ensemble' appears 3 times in one sentence), structural monotony in the three-pattern enumeration, and wordy constructions throughout. Fixing these is load-bearing; without it the delegation is not discharged.
